text_block_list.text:
One day, Daiwa Scarlet goes on a picnic with her
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No waaaaay! A suspension bridge?! How are we
supposed to cross this?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Huh?! This has to be some kind of joke! Those
little planks are spaced way too far apart!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(This is scary. But if I bow out now, there'll be no
one to help the others! ...All right!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We won't get anywhere at this rate! Everyone,
hold onto my hand!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Phew... We all made it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Geez, that was terrifying!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right? I thought we were goners, to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Scarlet. You had a blank look on your
face that whole time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Just like a model student to keep her cool. I feel
like we can't even compete.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Okay, onto our next spot. Can't wait to see what
challenges we're gonna have to deal with next! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Uh, wait, hold on. Honestly, I was pretty—hey!
Wait up!
Woosh!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What the heck? That makes it sound like...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Like I'm some boring stick-in-the-mud!

In the yard behind Tracen Academy, the place
where everyone vents in secret, Daiwa Scarlet
cries out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was super scared too, you know! I just wanted to
be the most reliable—the most dependable!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I wanted to ruin their fun at the picnic!
This is all so stupid! Stupid! STUPID!

I figure out the gist of what happened from her
yelling.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Grr! Fine. The next time something crazy happens, I'll make sure I have the most frightened reaction out of everyone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, would that be too much? I'd feel pretty
fake doing that... Ugh, this is so confusing...
choice_data_list: Um, do you mind if I say something?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
EEEEK! Where'd you come from?! Tch! Did you
hear all of that?!

After all my eavesdropping, I decide to offer her
some words of advice.
choice_data_list: I think practicing your reactions is a great idea.
Just stick with what feels natural to you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Practice my reactions?! Ugh. So you really heard
everything...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But you're right. Thank you. I'll go watch
UmaTube for some pointers...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Get a load of this. You wouldn't believe what happened to me during training.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Wowww, that's so wild.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Ooh! This is my chance! Time to put my reaction
training to use!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
OH. EM. GEE! That is, like, soooo crazy! Like, get
out! I'm on the edge of my seat here!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Uh, are you okay, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think? I sound super engaged, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I'm not sure that's how I'd put it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
...You really went all-in on the act, though. That
was such a good UmaTuber impression, it caught
me off guard.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A-a good what?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh. I guess those UmaTuber reaction videos
aren't the best reference after all. But still...)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I won't give up! Just you wait, I'm going to be the most fun person around! With the best reactions ever!

Daiwa Scarlet's sheer passion burns as she vows to
start having a total blast whenever possible.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whatever feels natural... Yeah, I guess you're
right. I should just be myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thanks very much! I get it now!
Daiwa Scarlet speeds off. Then, a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet! Did you hear? We're gonna have a
surprise pop quiz next class!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A quiz? Really?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, no use panicking. I'll just take it in stride
and think of it as a chance to show what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Whoa. Your composure never ceases to impress...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey Scarlet, perfect timing. Just wanted to let
you know...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I borrowed one of your scarves to polish my
leather jacket. 'Kay, thanks, seeya.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! What the heck were you thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Who gave you permission to use my scarf?! I'm
gonna use your jacket to polish my scarf!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Scarlet always seemed so laid-back
around us...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah but it looks like she's got a quick temper
with her friends. She's funny.

Daiwa Scarlet, the normally unfazed model
student, mercilessly lays into one of her closest
friends.
